prompt: Iterate on the plan. Phase 7 needs a new sub-phase 7.5 to handle database migration that was discovered during implementation. The new phase requires understanding the existing ORM setup.
expected_output: Spawns research agents to understand the ORM setup before adding Phase 7.5 to the plan. Updates success criteria if needed.
expectations: Spawns research subagents (codebase-locator, codebase-analyzer) to understand the ORM setup
Adds Phase 7.5 to the plan without disrupting completed phases
Updates TodoWrite to reflect the new phase
Maintains the separation of automated vs manual success criteria
Leaves no unresolved questions in the updated plan
